item.title: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.
item.description: First reading, referred to Labor & Commerce.

item.title: 👍💵Andrea Reay - Washington Hospitality Association
item.description: Andrea Reay signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Hospitality Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓Tammy Fellin - Department of Labor & Industries
item.description: Tammy Fellin signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Department of Labor & Industries.

item.title: 👍💵Rose Gundersen - WA Retail Association
item.description: Rose Gundersen signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA Retail Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Mike Ennis - Building Industry Association of Washington (BIAW)
item.description: Mike Ennis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Building Industry Association of Washington (BIAW).

item.title: 👍💵James Crandall - AWB
item.description: James Crandall signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent AWB. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: LC - Majority; do pass.
item.description: LC - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
